title: Finement
description: Refines some of the game with fixes and gameplay changes
body:
# Finement

Refines some of the game with fixes and gameplay changes

## Features

### Gameplay

<details><summary>Client-Side Hurt Animation</summary>

Plays the hurt animation client-side when attacking entities. 
Note that this occurs on all entities, use 'Only Enable on Real Players' to reduce it to just other players.

![me attacking the delivery man](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5eb04c5fe23026b97bf245d0b5a789217e672ab0.png)

</details>

<details><summary>0th Person Perspective</summary>

Press to go into an inaccessible and freaky looking perspective mode.

![me blocking my sword in 0th perspective](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66c200c3befd6a23359a5267acb88c78b6601d6f.png)

</details>

<details><summary>Perspective Dependant FOVs</summary>

Allows you to set specific FOVs for different perspectives.

![me looking down at the skyblock hub with 80 fov](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/773e7acfdc624bd61b2c8d3ccd7c79a6a9f7de80.png)
![me looking back at myself in third person with a lot more fov](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39cc3dbfb265701a329ab42e865f2282b3656c97.png)

</details>

<details><summary>Custom Color Codes</summary>
  
Allows you to set custom colors for different colors and their shadows.

![custom color codes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ccc78eef5a6f13ec6f47d91432a7133ab5d3afc1.png)

</details>

### Inventory

<details><summary>Smooth Slot Hovering</summary>

Draws square highlights at your mouse instead of snapping to slots.

![smooth slot hovering](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55b679d4543a67f902f125c81162c879cdbb68f4.png)

</details>

<details><summary>Snap Item Rendering</summary>

Snaps your held item in inventories to the currently hovered slot.

</details>

<details><summary>Don't Render Empty Tooltips</summary>

Don't render empty tooltips. 
Requires advanced tooltips (F3+H) to be off.

![empty tooltip rendered in bazaar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44a0a33a164c1ec404ad93117dcba892d88cdd12.png)
![empty tooltip NOT being rendered in bazaar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea4467679ed160daa8d6574c4646d420ea9c6c6b.png)

</details>

### Other

<details><summary>Silently Decline Server Resource Packs</summary>

Silently decline server resource packs, but tell the server that you successfully downloaded them.
You can add a chat message to tell when a server tries to send you a resource pack.

![silently declining server resource packs with the message](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b06af3391992cf51cf95c5c2315aeae794508dfe.png)

</details>

<details><summary>Unformat Chat Logs</summary>

Properly removes formatting from chat messages before logging them.
![formatted chat logs in console](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef4923e6038e4eea29c97b546a9398a2cbb58de6.png)
![unformatted chat logs in console](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/237c75c50ffa6a1e19801007406dce20b4aea15c.png)

</details>

<details><summary>Hide Missing Signature Errors</summary>

Hides "Signature is missing from textures payload" errors from being logged.

</details>
